text: Emergency broadcast activated at local FM station. Broadcasting disaster updates for Sitio Masag Albay 24 hours.
Road safety alert: Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga national highway has 15cm ashfall layer. Motorcycles banned from this route.
Heat wave claims 2 lives in Brgy. Daraga Albay. Both elderly residents. DOH urges public to check on seniors.
Ang DSWD ay naghahanda ng food packs para sa mga pamilyang lumikas dahil sa bulkang aktibidad sa Barangay Paco Manila.
Libreng handa sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos community kitchen. Priority sa mga bata at matatanda ngayong mainit ang panahon.
Ang mga cell tower ay nasira ng bagyo sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Kailangan ng bagong equipment para maitayo.
Manila air quality update: Lahat ng 4 monitoring stations ay nagpapakita ng VERY UNHEALTHY. Manatiling alerto at sundan ang susunod na update.
DepEd releases learning continuity plan for flood-affected areas in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Printed modules distributed.
DSWD distributes relief goods to 500 families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Distribution at the barangay covered court. Bring valid ID.
NDRRMC activates full response for Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City eruption. Pre-positioned relief goods and rescue teams on standby.
Communication restored in Sitio Riverside Marikina using emergency satellite link. Contact numbers for LGU updated.
Ang rescue team ay nakarating na sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Nagsisimula na ang pagliligtas sa mga naiipit sa lahar.
Ang mga pamilyang lumikas mula sa Barangay Marikina Heights ay tumatanggap ng dalawang food pack at bottled water bawat isa.
Barangay Brgy. Tumana Marikina begins door-to-door evacuation along sitio riverside. Officials and BFP assisting families.
Eye wash stations set up at Brgy. Daraga Albay health center for residents affected by ashfall irritation.
NDRRMC confirms all residents within Mayon 6-km PDZ have been evacuated. Monitoring continues 24 hours.
Walang pasok bukas! Ang lahat ng paaralan sa Barangay Balulang CDO ay sarado. Manatili sa bahay at mag-ingat.
NTC advisory: Temporary frequency spectrum allocation for disaster communications in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga area.
Classes resume next Monday for Brgy. Fatima General Santos schools. Buildings assessed as safe. See you mga estudyante!
RESCUE NEEDED: Family trapped by lahar flow in Barangay Paco Manila! Water and mud at rooftop level! SOS!
DOH at Manila DRRM nagbababala tungkol sa masamang kalidad ng hangin. Mga sintomas ng polusyon: ubo, pangangati ng mata, kahirapan sa paghinga.
Privacy partitions installed for families at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro gymnasium. Breastfeeding area and child-friendly space also set up.
Lahar flow blocking the main highway near Brgy. Carmen CDO. DPWH monitoring. Alternate route via mountain road.
Huwag uminom ng tubig mula sa gripo sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Contaminated na dahil sa baha. Bumili ng mineral water.
Nag-distribute na ng relief goods sa brgy hall ng Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Magdala ng ID para makakuha ng food pack.
May nastranded na hikers sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila bundok dahil sa landslide. Search party naalis na.
Mga donation ng tubig at pagkain para sa mga evacuees mula Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley volcano ay tinatanggap sa barangay hall.
Community feeding program active in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte for families unable to cook due to power outage from eruption.
Rescue boat needed at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City lahar danger zone! Nanay at tatlong bata stranded. Rescue team padating.
Typhoon-displaced students from Brgy. San Roque Marikina given printed modules while evacuation centers active.
Calling all donors! Accepting relief goods donations for Barangay Marikina Heights flood victims. Drop off at the covered court.
ALERT: Maraming bata ang may lagnat sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation center! Kailangan ng doktor at gamot dito ngayon!
NDRRMC advisory: Effusive eruption at Mayon Volcano persists. Lava flows and rockfalls ongoing. Danger zone strictly enforced.
Temporary cell tower installed at Brgy. San Roque Marikina evacuation area. Signal strength 3G. Voice calls operational.
Class suspension confirmed! Walang klase bukas sa lahat ng levels sa Sitio Masag Albay. Abangan ang advisory.
NDRRMC confirms 0 typhoon fatalities in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga due to preemptive evacuation. Officials commend LGU action.
Overcrowding na sa Sitio Masag Albay evacuation site. Secondary shelter sa barangay chapel ay bukas na ngayon.
Alternate road to Brgy. San Roque Marikina via provincial bypass now operational. DPWH opens route for relief convoys.
MISSING: Ang aking tatay ay nawala noong baha sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Mangyaring makipag-ugnayan sa amin.
Remains of 2 typhoon victims recovered at Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Pending identification at provincial morgue.
URGENT: Kulang na ang bottled water sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga relief center! Requesting immediate resupply from LGU!
MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK! Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin ngayon dahil sa usok mula sa sunog sa Navotas Landfill. Huwag lumabas nang walang proteksyon.
Mga guro sa Barangay Paco Manila nagboboluntaryo sa evacuation center habang walang klase.
Ang mga evacuees mula sa Sitio Masag Albay volcanic zone ay maaaring mag-register sa DSWD para sa assistance.
Blackout pa rin sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Running low na sa power bank. Sana maibalik na ang kuryente.
Naiipit pa rin ang 500 pamilya sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Hindi pa nakakarating ang rescue boat. Tulong po!
Hotline ng Manila City DRRM Department para sa emergency: (02) 8463-3295 / 0950-700-3710. Tumawag kung may health emergency dahil sa polusyon.
PLDT fiber cut in Brgy. San Roque Marikina due to ashfall weight on cables. Internet service disrupted for area.
Logistics team coordinating chopper delivery to cut-off communities in Sitio Masag Albay after roads washed out.
Death toll from heat stroke in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga province rises to 4. DOH urges extreme caution during heat wave.
Mababa ang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila simula ngayong gabi. Mga may asthma at respiratory conditions: huwag lumabas. Gamitin ang inhaler.
Ang alternate route via sitio Barangay Balulang CDO ay passable na para sa medium trucks. 4WD recommended.
No classes in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley tomorrow. Typhoon signal raised. DepEd prioritizes student safety.
EMERGENCY: Tubig! Walang tubig dito sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina! Grabe ang init tapos wala na ring minom! Tulong po!
Structure fire reported at Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga public market. BFP units responding. 2-alarm fire declared.
Rescue operation in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City: 30 persons rescued this afternoon. Operations continuing for remaining stranded.
Road to Sitio Riverside Marikina IMPASSABLE due to landslide. DPWH equipment deployed. Alternate route via highway 12.
Philippine Air Force helicopter rescuing communities isolated by lahar flows in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City volcano slopes.
HELP! Our neighbor is trapped on the second floor in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro! Water still rising! 911 not answering!
Cell towers coated with volcanic ash in Barangay Agusan CDO. Globe and Smart signal degraded. Engineers deploying.
Volcanic eruption damaged power infrastructure near Brgy. Carmen CDO. Blackout expected for 2 to 3 days.
Food packs containing 5kg rice, sardines, and canned goods available at Barangay Marikina Heights distribution center. One pack per family.
No electricity in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Complete blackout since typhoon hit. No signal, no internet, no power.
DOH nagpaalala sa mga evacuees sa Brgy. Daraga Albay na inumin ang maintenance medicine. Available ang refills sa clinic.
Naputol ang tulay papunta sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Pag-aralan ang ibang daan bago umalis.
No signal and no power in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan volcano evacuation zone. Emergency radio only communication channel.
Evacuation center ni-register lahat ng displaced families sa Sitio Riverside Marikina. Magdala ng ID at gamit para isang linggo.
Globe signal bumalik na sa ilang parte ng Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Smart at PLDT wala pa. Working on restoration.
BFP and NDRRMC rescue team extracting 300 families from lahar-inundated areas of Barangay Agusan CDO.
Mga estudyante sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga ay nakatanggap ng printed modules habang sarado ang kanilang paaralan.
Hindi pa rin maibalik ang signal sa Barangay Paco Manila. Ang komunikasyon ay sa radyo na lang.
Lahar monitoring in Barangay Agusan CDO: flow detected at 2m height in river channel. Road closures preemptive.
Emergency water distribution for drought-hit families in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. 20L per household, bring container.
Community kitchen at Barangay Paco Manila is now serving hot meals. Queue management in effect. Priority for elderly and children.
PHIVOLCS volcano bulletin: Mayon showing continued effusive activity for the 110th consecutive day. Danger zone remains enforced.
Ang paaralan sa Brgy. Carmen CDO ay ginagamit bilang evacuation center. Suspendido ang klase hanggang maalis ang evacuees.
PHIVOLCS nagpapanatili ng Alert Level 3 sa Mayon Bulkan. Ipinagbabawal ang pagpasok sa 6-km Permanent Danger Zone.
PHIVOLCS raises Alert Level 3 over Mayon Volcano. Entry into the 6-km Permanent Danger Zone (PDZ) is strictly prohibited.
DPWH ash-clearing trucks deployed overnight in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Expect limited visibility and road narrowing.
Typhoon death toll in Brgy. Talisay Batangas confirmed at 300 by NDRRMC. Recovery operations continuing.
Senior citizens at bata sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad: manatili sa loob ng bahay. Ang air quality ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY level ngayon.

NDRRMC BawatSegundoMahalaga: Effusive eruption ng Mayon Volcano ay nagpapatuloy. Incandescent lava flows pyroclastic density currents at rockfalls ang naitala. Alert Level 3 sa Mayon. Ipinagbabawal ang pagpasok sa 6-km PDZ.
DepEd nagbibigay ng make-up classes pagkatapos ng baha. School calendar extended ng 2 linggo sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley.
NDRRMC rescue teams extract 50 families from flood-affected sitio in Brgy. Fatima General Santos.
Food assistance ongoing for displaced families in Brgy. Tumana Marikina following volcanic activity. Bring barangay ID.
Cool center at Sitio Riverside Marikina gymnasium open 6am to 10pm. Libreng tubig, electric fan, at first aid on standby.
DepEd releases distance learning materials for Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro students during school closure.
SOS! Out of stock na ang relief goods sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. 300 families pa ang walang makain ngayong gabi!
Natuklasan ang katawan ng isa sa mga nawawalang residente sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Ipinagdadasal namin siya.
Water containers and purification tablets distributed to 500 households in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Instructions included.
Coast Guard conducting swift water rescue in Barangay Balulang CDO river. 12 families rescued so far. Operations ongoing.
Ang mga displaced families sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley ay puwedeng manatili sa evacuation center hanggang ligtas na.
Road advisory: thick ashfall deposit on Sitio Kapatagan Leyte national highway. Reduce speed. Use headlights. Wear mask.
Red Cross distributing relief goods to volcano-affected families in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Operations 7am to 5pm.
Emergency radio broadcast activated for Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: tune to 702 DZAS for 24-hour disaster updates.
Academic year extended for Barangay Agusan CDO schools disrupted by volcanic activity. DepEd announcement.
Walang kuryente at walang signal sa Sitio Mabolo Albay. Ganap na nahiwalay sa komunikasyon.
BFP responds to fire at Barangay Marikina Heights barangay. 2 families rescued from burning structure. Fire under control.
Logistics team coordinating boat transport for communities cut off by flooding in Brgy. Pandacan Manila.
TXTFIRE! Sunog sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte! Tumawag sa BFP ngayon! Lumayas na sa lugar!
Ang mga evacuees sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental covered court ay bibigyan ng pagkain at mga gamit ngayong gabi.
75 families allowed to return home after flood receded in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. 300 families still remaining in shelter.
ALERTO: Ang usok mula sa sunog sa landfill ay nakakaapekto sa kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila at karatig-siyudad. Magsuot ng N95 mask.

Mayon Volcano Observatory: Incandescent lava fountaining recorded at summit crater. PDC uson generated along gullies. Sulfur dioxide emissions elevated. Alert Level 3 remains. Do not enter 6-km Permanent Danger Zone.
HELP! Stuck sa bubong ng bahay sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro habang tumataas ang lahar! May kasama akong sanggol!
Alert Level 4 declared for Kanlaon Volcano. All residents within 8-km danger zone must evacuate immediately.
Helicopter rescue ongoing for communities in Sitio Riverside Marikina cut off by landslide. 50 persons airlifted.
No network sa amin sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos! May makaka-abot ba sa Iligan? May signal pa ba diyan?
SOS! TRAPPED SA BUBONG! Floodwater waist-deep at rising fast! Need rescue boat AGAD sa Sitio Riverside Marikina!
Meralco please ayusin na ang power sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina! 72 oras na walang kuryente. Grabe na ito!
Rescue swimmer needed at Barangay Balulang CDO lahar crossing! Vehicle swept away! Occupants still inside!
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Road to Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcano observation post closed due to volcanic hazard. Only PHIVOLCS personnel allowed.
Naglumikas na po kami dahil sa bulkan sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Nandito na kami sa covered court. Ligtas naman.
Typhoon Signal No. 4 raised over Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Mandatory pre-emptive evacuation of coastal and low-lying areas.
Power restored to 60% of Sitio Mabolo Albay after typhoon damage repairs. Remaining areas by end of day.
May klase ba bukas? Hindi pa malinaw ang DepEd advisory sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Abangan ang opisyal na anunsyo.
Air quality advisory: Barangay Paco Manila classified VERY UNHEALTHY due to volcanic ashfall. Wear N95 mask outdoors.
Ang mga guro sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban ay nagboboluntaryo sa evacuation center habang suspendido ang klase.
Bridge inspection underway at Barangay Anibong Tacloban. Currently closed pending structural assessment by DPWH engineers.
Ang kuryente sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte ay naibalik na. Salamat sa Meralco at sa lahat ng nagtrabaho.
PHIVOLCS-DOST: Strombolian activity observed at Mayon summit crater. Pyroclastic density currents possible. Stay outside danger zone.
Ang DSWD MDM team ay aktibo sa Brgy. Carmen CDO para sa family tracing at death certificate processing.
DRRMO Tacloban coordinating with PHIVOLCS for updated danger zone maps for Brgy. Tumana Marikina volcano evacuation.
School canteen operations suspended in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley evacuation center schools. Students receive packed meals.
Confirmed dead in the landslide at Barangay Paco Manila: 2 adults, 1 child. Search for more survivors ongoing.
Bridge at Barangay Agusan CDO washed out by flash flood. Heavy vehicles diverted via pontoon bridge.
Missing persons report: 5 residents of Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga unaccounted for since volcanic eruption 3 days ago.
Water refill stations activated at Brgy. Daraga Albay. Residents may bring containers up to 20 liters per household.
Rescue operation sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga: dalawang bata ang naligtas sa baha. Nagpapatuloy pa ang paghahanap.
WALANG PASOK: Ashfall from Brgy. Daraga Albay volcano covers school grounds. Students must stay home.
MISSING: Juan dela Cruz, 55 years old, last seen at Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley before the typhoon. Wearing blue jacket.
Preemptive evacuation order issued for danger zones in Barangay Anibong Tacloban. LGU providing transport assistance.
UV index EXTREME sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte ngayon. Magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng sombrero kapag lumabas.
Family welfare desks naka-set up sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation site. I-report dito ang mga nawawalang miyembro ng pamilya.
Mag-ingat sa leptospirosis! Huwag lumakad sa baha nang walang proteksyon sa Barangay Balulang CDO at karatig-lugar.
Huwag kalimutang uminom ng tubig! Heat index sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga ay nakakatakot na mainit ngayon. Mag-ingat.
Ang kalsada papunta sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte ay natatakpan ng makapal na abo. DPWH nag-aayos. Huwag muna pumunta.
Chokepoint sa national highway ng Brgy. Tumana Marikina dahil sa demolition ng damaged bridge. Abangan ang updates.
Ambulance requested para sa 3 critical patients sa Barangay Paco Manila evacuation center! Kailangan ng transport ngayon!
DPWH road clearing underway in Barangay Anibong Tacloban after ashfall. Roads expected to be fully passable by tomorrow morning.
DepEd issues class suspension for Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental schools. Ashfall makes roads impassable for students.
WALANG PASOK bukas sa lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Daraga Albay! DepEd order na. Stay safe mga estudyante.
Sulphur dioxide emission from Mayon Volcano at hazardous levels. All residents within PDZ must have evacuated by tonight.
Air quality advisory: VERY UNHEALTHY level detected in Manila and nearby cities. Ang mga bata, senior citizens, buntis, at may hika ay dapat manatili sa loob.
Air quality warning: Huwag mag-exercise sa labas ng bahay ngayon sa Maynila. Ang masamang hangin ay mapanganib sa puso at baga.
DepEd advisory sa Barangay Balulang CDO: lahat ng paaralan ay sarado bukas dahil sa Signal No. 3.
Remains of 2 victims of Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga volcanic lahar identified at provincial morgue. Burial rites ongoing.
Ipinagpapaliban ang lahat ng school activities sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan hanggang sa karagdagang paunawa ng DepEd.
Kanlaon Watch: Alert Level 2 raised. Residents within 4-km radius must pre-emptively evacuate. NDRRMC on full alert.
PHIVOLCS update: Mayon crater glow intensifying. Possibility of explosive eruption cannot be ruled out. Alert Level 3 maintained.
Ang MDM team ng NDRRMC ay aktibo sa Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Mag-report ng mga nawawalang kamag-anak dito.
Ang DSWD ay nagbibigay ng mga batayang pangangailangan sa mga pamilyang apektado ng baha sa Sitio Masag Albay.
Walang klase bukas sa lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. DepEd order dahil sa bagyo.
Walang kuryente sa Barangay Agusan CDO dahil sa abo ng bulkan. Meralco nag-iinspeksyon ng mga linya.
Navy rescue personnel assisting in evacuation of stranded residents in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley floodwater.
1 dead, 3 missing after landslide in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. NDRRMC rescue team recovers body from debris.
DSWD andito na sa amin sa Sitio Riverside Marikina! Nagbibigay ng hygiene kit at relief goods. Salamat po!
Power restoration crew nagtatrabaho overnight sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan. Asahan ang pagbabalik ng kuryente bukas.
Ang mga naiipit ay inililigtas na sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Huwag matakot. Ang rescue team ay patungo na.
Death toll rises to 8 as recovery operations continue in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Search for 5 missing persons ongoing.
Nagpapadala ng karagdagang cots at kumot sa Barangay Anibong Tacloban evacuation centers para sa mga bagong dating na evacuees.
Relief convoy galing Marikina dumating na sa Barangay Agusan CDO. 200 boxes ng relief goods at hygiene kits.
Bridge at Brgy. Daraga Albay flooded with lahar debris. Engineers inspecting structural integrity before reopening.
Food packs with high-energy biscuits and canned goods being distributed in Barangay Anibong Tacloban volcanic evacuation area.
Typhoon casualty: body of missing resident from Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental found 5km from home. Family contacted.
Rescue boat needed URGENTLY at Brgy. Fatima General Santos! Elderly couple stranded on roof. Please respond now!
Mental health team available sa Brgy. Daraga Albay evacuation center. Libre ang psychosocial support para sa lahat.
National highway flooded in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Passable for light vehicles only. Heavy trucks must use alternate route.
No face-to-face classes hanggang sa karagdagang abiso. Distance learning mode activated para sa Barangay Agusan CDO.
No classes na naman bukas! Bagyo ulit sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. DepEd suspends ulit ang pasok.
Lumikas na po ang mga pamilya sa mababang lugar ng Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Handa ang evacuation center sa covered court.
Blackout na nang 2 araw sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina. Generator na lang ang naiiwanan namin. Sana mabilis na.
Facemask reminder: Ang air quality sa Lungsod ng Maynila ay VERY UNHEALTHY na. Protektahan ang inyong kalusugan. Iwasan ang outdoor activities.
Volcano alert in Sitio Kapatagan Leyte: Barangay captains conducting door-to-door checks to ensure all residents evacuated.
Wala na kaming signal dito sa evacuation center ng Brgy. Poblacion Iligan! Globe at Smart patay na. Radio lang.
Puno na ang evacuation center sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Pumunta sa bagong shelter sa sports complex ng bayan.
Ang lahar mula sa bulkan ay tumatawid sa kalsada ng Sitio Kapatagan Leyte. Sarado na ang daan. Gumamit ng alternative route.
SOS mula sa Barangay Marikina Heights: nastranded na hikers, 5 tao, 2 sugatan. Mountain trail blocked ng landslide.
Air quality update sa Maynila: VERY UNHEALTHY level. Possibleng dahilan ang usok mula sa Navotas Landfill. Manatiling alerto.
URGENT: Wala na pong food pack dito sa Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga! Need pa ng bigas at canned goods para sa 100 families!
Evacuation centers for Sitio Mabolo Albay volcano evacuees now open at Tacloban covered court and gymnasium.

NDRRMC advisory on Mayon Volcano: Effusive eruption producing lava flows uson pyroclastic currents and rockfalls. Alert Level 3. All residents within 6-km PDZ must remain evacuated. Do not return without PHIVOLCS clearance.
Sunstroke warning for outdoor workers in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Wear hat, drink water every 15 minutes. Avoid direct sunlight.
Health alert sa Maynila: Ang mga nagtatrabaho sa labas ng bahay ay dapat magbihis ng makapal at magsuot ng N95 mask laban sa polusyon.
Relief goods delivery to Brgy. Poblacion Iligan delayed due to 3 blocked roads. Air delivery being explored by NDRRMC.
Libre na gamot para sa mga may sakit sa Sitio Mabolo Albay evacuation center. Pumunta sa health tent.
LGU nagbubukas ng 5 dagdag na evacuation centers sa Brgy. Fatima General Santos para sa mga lumikas mula sa bulkan.
Ang pamilya ng mga biktima ng lahar sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas ay maaaring pumunta sa MDM desk para sa tulong.
ADVISORY: MAGSUOT NG FACEMASK. Naitala ang VERY UNHEALTHY sa Air Quality Sensors ng Lungsod ng Maynila. Iwasan ang paglabas kung hindi kinakailangan.
Body found along the Brgy. Tumana Marikina riverbank identified as flood victim. Family notified. Burial arrangements ongoing.
Families from Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga danger zones transported via LGU buses to inland evacuation shelters.
Mountain rescue: SARDA team deployed for 8 missing hikers in Sitio Mabolo Albay after trail buried by landslide.
Casualty update for Barangay Paco Manila: 100 dead confirmed, bodies recovered and brought to provincial morgue.
Air quality VERY UNHEALTHY sa Puregold Tayuman area at karatig-lugar. Mahigpit na inirerekomenda na huwag lumabas nang walang facemask.
School cancellation alert: Lahat ng paaralan sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay sarado bukas dahil sa bagyo.
WASH advisory: Boil all drinking water in Brgy. Talisay Batangas following ashfall contamination of water sources.
Ang aming pamilya ay naka-shelter na sa Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga covered court. May relief goods at tubig. Salamat DSWD.
Nag-aalaga ng lolo naming may hypertension sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Sobrang init. Saan kami makakakuha ng libre na konsultasyon?
Ang lahar ay dumating na sa bayan ng Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Huwag na lumabas. Sarado lahat ng daan.
Ang mga bata sa Brgy. Tumana Marikina ay binibigyan ng bitamina at gamot. Dalhin ang inyong anak sa health tent.
Usok mula sa Navotas Landfill fire ay patuloy na nakakaapekto sa air quality ng Maynila, Malabon, Navotas, at Caloocan. Mag-ingat.
Hikers rescued from Brgy. Tumana Marikina mountain trail after being stranded by volcanic activity. All safe.
Solar charging stations set up by DSWD in Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga evacuation center for displaced residents.
Brownout schedule sa Barangay Balulang CDO ngayong araw dahil sa overloading ng grid dahil sa mainit na panahon.
Food donation drive ongoing for Brgy. Carmen CDO. Target: 500 food packs for displaced families. Help us reach the goal.
Fire out at Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga! BFP controlled the fire. No casualties reported. BFP reminds public to report fires immediately.
Road network update for Brgy. Pandacan Manila: 3 routes open, 2 blocked by landslide, 1 passable for light vehicles only.
Child-friendly space opened at Brgy. Carmen CDO evacuation center for minors. Activities and psychosocial support ongoing.
Heat-related rescue in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: elderly woman in distress found on street during extreme heat advisory.

PHIVOLCS-DOST volcano bulletin: Mayon effusive eruption day 112. Lava flow advancing 3km southeast. Pyroclastic density currents PDC generated. Rockfalls frequent. Alert Level 3 in effect. Danger zone access strictly prohibited.
Nutrition assistance para sa malnourished children sa Brgy. Talisay Batangas health center. Magdala ng health card.
Nandito na kami sa evacuation center sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City. Ikatlong gabi na namin dito. Sana makauwi na kami.
Road update: Barangay Paco Manila national road now passable for light vehicles after DPWH ashfall clearing operations.
DepEd suspends classes in Brgy. San Roque Marikina due to Typhoon Signal No. 3. All schools closed tomorrow.
Cell site sa bundok ng Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental natanggal ng bagyo. Satellite phone lang ang gumagana sa lugar.
Decampment process simula na sa Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro evacuation center. LGU tumutulong sa mga pamilyang umuuwi na.
Wala na pong signal sa buong Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga. Globe, Smart, TM lahat wala. Gumagamit na kami ng radio.

KANLAON WATCH: Close-up footage of minor Strombolian activity at summit crater of Mayon Volcano captured by Mayon Volcano Observatory. Effusive eruption persists for the 110th consecutive day producing incandescent lava flows pyroclastic density currents PDC uson and frequent rockfalls. Alert Level 3 remains in effect. Entry into the 6-km Permanent Danger Zone strictly prohibited. PHIVOLCS-DOST NDRRMC.
Lahar rescue operations ongoing in Brgy. San Roque Marikina river channel. Army and BFP boats deployed for stranded residents.
Road passability update: 6 of 9 routes to Barangay Anibong Tacloban now open. 3 still blocked by debris and ashfall.
Family tracing desk bukas sa Brgy. Carmen CDO evacuation center. I-report ang mga nawawalang pamilya ngayon.
Rescue operations in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan: BFP, PNP, and Army coordinating extraction of 40 stranded residents.
Tulong po para sa mga pamilyang walang makain sa Barangay Agusan CDO. Makikipag-ugnayan sa DSWD para sa relief goods.
Volcanic ash from Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro volcano detected. Air quality hazardous. Wear masks and close windows.
Post-mortem examination ordered for body found in Brgy. Fatima General Santos. Identity still being confirmed by authorities.
Fire update: BFP contained the blaze at Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro warehouse after 2 hours. Investigation ongoing.
Ang tulay sa Sitio Riverside Marikina ay nasira ng baha at lahar. Kailangan ng ilang linggo bago maayos.
Missing person: family tracing for 3 persons from Brgy. Fatima General Santos who have not contacted family since typhoon.
Manila City DRRM nagbibigay ng libreng facemasks sa mga barangay hall. Pumunta na ngayon para protektahan ang inyong pamilya mula sa polusyon.

Emergency satellite communication deployed in Barangay Balulang CDO for disaster coordination after cell tower damage.
150 displaced families now sheltered at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City gymnasium. Additional centers being opened tonight.
Panahon ng tag-araw: nagbibigay ang DSWD ng rehydration packs at snacks sa mga batang apektado sa Barangay Balulang CDO.
Libre ang canned goods at bigas para sa mga nasalanta sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Pumunta na sa distribution point.
Ang sunog sa Navotas Landfill ay nagdudulot ng masamang kalidad ng hangin sa buong Maynila. Sarado ang ilang outdoor venues bilang pag-iingat.
3 bodies recovered from debris in Brgy. Talisay Batangas. Death toll officially revised upward. Autopsies ordered.
DPWH road clearing operations ongoing on national highway at Brgy. Carmen CDO. Expect 6 to 8 hour delay.
DSWD providing water and food to heat-affected communities in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan. Hydration packs included.
Power restoration underway in Barangay Paco Manila. 70 percent of households back online as of 6pm.
Sarado ang pangunahing daan sa Brgy. Daraga Albay dahil sa landslide. DPWH nagtatrabaho na.
Heat wave causing power demand surge in Sitio Mabolo Albay. Meralco warns of possible brownout 1pm to 6pm.
Schools in Sitio Mabolo Albay to remain closed for 1 week due to typhoon and flood damage.
Meron pang food packs sa Brgy. Daraga Albay hanggang ngayong hapon. Magdala ng ID at pumunta na agad.
Water refill stations now at 5 strategic points in Sitio Riverside Marikina. Free for all residents during heat emergency.
Pediatric advisory: Huwag palabasin ang mga bata sa labas ng bahay sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental dahil sa matinding init.
Ang mga relief goods ay naghihintay sa barangay hall ng Sitio Masag Albay. Pumunta na at magdala ng ID.
Mayon Volcano lava flow reaches 3.2 km from summit. PHIVOLCS warns of possible pyroclastic surge. Danger zone strictly enforced.
Academic calendar suspended for affected schools in Brgy. San Roque Marikina. DepEd to announce make-up class schedule.
Port operations suspended in Brgy. Daraga Albay. Supply barges on standby. Coast Guard monitoring conditions.
School closure in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley: buildings covered with volcanic ash. Cleaning needed before reopening.
LGU Cavite distributes 300 food packs and 50 hygiene kits to flood-affected families today.
Hydration stations set up along evacuation routes from Brgy. Talisay Batangas due to high heat index. Water and ORS available.
Heatwave relief: cold water, ORS, and snacks available at Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga community center. Libre para sa lahat.
DepEd suspends classes in Brgy. Poblacion Iligan for 3 days due to typhoon damage to school buildings.
Management of the Dead and Missing team deployed to Brgy. Daraga Albay by NDRRMC. Operations 24 hours.
Typhoon blew out main transformer serving Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. Replacement unit being transported from Marikina.
Ang effusive eruption ng Mayon Volcano ay nagpapatuloy. Lava flows, PDC, at rockfalls aktibo. Manatiling malayo sa danger zone.
NFI distribution: hygiene kits and sleeping mats for 150 displaced families from Sitio Riverside Marikina volcanic zone.
Water purification tablets distributed to 200 households in Brgy. Pandacan Manila. Do not drink untreated floodwater.
DOH issues dengue alert alongside heat advisory in Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Remove stagnant water. Use mosquito repellent.
DOH mobile clinic stationed at Sitio Masag Albay. Treating fever, wound care, diarrhea, and leptospirosis cases.
Evacuation order lifted for parts of Sitio Mabolo Albay. Residents may return home after clearance from DRRMO.
Post-mortem results for heat stroke victim from Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley: cause of death heat hyperthermia. Third case this week.
Meralco linemen nagtatrabaho sa tag-araw na init para maibalik ang kuryente sa Barangay Balulang CDO. Salamat!
May leptospirosis na sa aming lugar sa Sitio Masag Albay. Iwasan ang pagtapak sa maruming tubig-baha. Mag-ingat!
NTC coordinating with telcos for priority restoration of Sitio Masag Albay DRRMO communication lines.
USAR team deployed to collapsed building in Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro. 3 persons confirmed trapped inside structure.
Sanitation teams disinfecting evacuation centers in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley to prevent cholera and disease outbreak.
Respiratory health alert: Fine particulate matter levels in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley exceeding safe limits due to volcanic emissions.
DOH issues leptospirosis alert for flood-affected barangays in Brgy. Carmen CDO. Avoid wading in floodwater. Wear protective boots.
DepEd suspends enrollment activities in Sitio Masag Albay due to ongoing typhoon. Rescheduled next week.
Missing fishermen from Sitio Mabolo Albay declared dead after 30-day search. Bodies never recovered. Certificates issued.
Nakatanggap na kami ng food pack at tubig mula DSWD sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. May kasamang canned goods at blanket.
Camp coordination team at Barangay Agusan CDO: headcount ongoing. 150 registered evacuees as of 6pm.
School buildings in Brgy. Fatima General Santos being used as evacuation centers. All classes moved to online learning mode.
Clean water supply restored to Barangays 4 to 7 in Barangay Paco Manila. Boil for 5 minutes before drinking as precaution.
Isinasagawa ang headcount ng lahat ng evacuees sa Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City evacuation center. Pumirma sa logbook.
Death toll from flash flood in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan confirmed at 6. NDRRMC concludes search after 7 days.
WALANG PASOK bukas sa Barangay Paco Manila! DepEd nag-suspend ng klase dahil sa malakas na ulan at baha.
Road subsidence detected on provincial road of Barangay Sta. Rita Pampanga. Heavy vehicles must detour via bypass.
No power in Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley for 48 hours. Generator sets operating at hospitals and evacuation centers.
Ante-mortem data collection ongoing for Sitio Masag Albay flood victims. Bring recent photos and descriptions.
Heat stroke emergency: 5 outdoor workers collapsed in Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City needing immediate medical rescue.
SOS! Naiipit ang aming pamilya sa lahar sa Brgy. Pandacan Manila! Hindi na kami makalabas sa bahay! Tulong!
REMINDER: Ang paggamit ng facemask ay mandatory sa labas habang masamang kalidad ng hangin sa Maynila. N95 o surgical mask ang inirerekomenda.
DepEd nag-announce na ng no classes. Mag-stay sa bahay mga bata. Hindi ligtas lumabas ngayon sa Brgy. Carmen CDO.
No internet available sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley upland barangays. PLDT deploying additional equipment.
Internet access via satellite terminal available at Brgy. Bagong Silangan Quezon City municipal hall for disaster coordination.
MISSING child: Anak ko nawawala! 8 years old, nahulog sa baha malapit sa Barangay Paco Manila. Tulong po!
Volunteers needed para sa repacking ng relief items sa Sitio Bungkalan Misamis Oriental. Report sa DSWD office by 7am bukas.
Ang Manila DRRM ay nagmo-monitor ng air quality sa 4 na sensor locations. Kasalukuyang lahat ay nasa VERY UNHEALTHY hanggang HAZARDOUS na antas.
DOH-Tacloban nagpapadala ng health team para subaybayan ang mga heat stroke at dehydration cases sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan.
URGENT: Patient na may symptoms ng leptospirosis sa Brgy. Poblacion Iligan covered court. Need first aid team agad!
Rescue team ng NDRRMC nagliligtas ng mga pamilya sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan mula sa banta ng lahar ng bulkan.
MAYDAY! Naiipit kami sa loob ng bahay sa Brgy. Daraga Albay! Tubig hanggang bintana na! Tulong po!
Heat advisory from PAGASA: Barangay Balulang CDO and nearby municipalities to experience 'feels like' temperature of 48°C tomorrow.
Puno na ang unang evacuation center sa Brgy. Daraga Albay. Pumunta na sa Sports Hub bilang secondary shelter.
Pyroclastic density currents or 'uson' recorded at Mayon today. Extreme danger within 6-km PDZ. Do not return to danger zone.
Body of missing fisherman from Barangay Sto. Nino Cagayan de Oro recovered at Cagayan de Oro shoreline. PCG coordinating with family.
LUMIKAS NA KAYO! Mataas na ang tubig dito sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. Bukas na ang evacuation center sa elementarya.
Lahar alert in Mayon river channels during rain. Residents in river valleys must evacuate regardless of alert level.
Leptospirosis risk remains HIGH in Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan post-flood areas. Still avoid wading even after waters recede.
Safe naman kami sa Brgy. Calumpit Bulacan evacuation site. Maraming salamat sa lahat ng nagbigay ng pagkain at tulong.
Ashfall-induced brownout in Brgy. San Joaquin Pampanga: short circuit from ash accumulation on transformer. Clearing ongoing.
FIRE! Sumalab ang bahay sa Sitio Kinabukasan Cagayan Valley. BFP patungo na. Lumayo na mga tao sa paligid!
pageName: Bureau of Fire Protection Region X

text: Body identified as missing resident from Brgy. Carmen CDO. Next of kin contacted. Interment on Saturday.
Ang mga guro ay nagbibigay ng mga module sa mga estudyanteng hindi makarating sa paaralan sa Sitio Masag Albay.
Ash deposits 10cm thick on Barangay Balulang CDO highway. DPWH recommends complete avoidance until cleared.
MISSING: Lola Nena, 78, nawawala mula nang lumikas sa volcanic eruption sa Brgy. San Roque Marikina. Pink duster.
Air quality advisory para sa mga may sakit sa puso: Huwag lumabas habang ang air quality index ay nasa 201-300 range sa Maynila ngayon.
Ang relief goods mula sa LGU ay ibinibigay na sa mga affected families sa Barangay Marikina Heights. Isa lang per pamilya.
DRRM update: Air quality sa Maynila ay bahagyang bumababa mula HAZARDOUS papunta VERY UNHEALTHY. Patuloy na mag-ingat at magsuot ng mask.

SERVICE ADVISORY: Emergency repair and maintenance activities scheduled May 14-19 affecting Pasig, Taguig, Quezon City, Manila, Marikina, Rizal. Expect water interruption in affected areas. Manila Water regulated and monitored by MWSS Regulatory Office.

WATER INTERRUPTION NOTICE: Maynilad scheduled emergency pipeline repair on May 15 will affect Caloocan, Malabon, Navotas, and Valenzuela. Water supply cut from 10PM to 6AM. Residents advised to store water in advance.

ADVISORY: Emergency repair of burst main pipeline in Quezon City. Water supply unavailable in Batasan Hills, Commonwealth, and nearby barangays today. Estimated restoration by 8PM. Water rationing trucks deployed.

WATER SERVICE DISRUPTION: Typhoon damage to water treatment facility in Angat reduced supply by 40%. Affected: Metro Manila and parts of Bulacan. Manila Water implementing zonal rationing. Check website for schedule.

MAYNILAD ADVISORY: Emergency shutdown of Putatan Water Treatment Plant due to turbidity surge caused by heavy rains. Service interruption 24-48 hours for Muntinlupa, Las Pinas, Paranaque, and parts of Cavite.

URGENT: Contaminated water supply reported in Brgy. Tondo Manila after floodwaters infiltrated distribution line. Residents warned NOT to use tap water for drinking or cooking. Boil water advisory in effect. Tanker trucks dispatched.

Water supply alert: MWSS reports reduction in raw water supply from Angat Dam due to El Nino. Conservation measures in effect. Metro Manila residents urged to limit water use. Supply rotation schedule posted on MWSS website.

NOTICE: Pipe rehabilitation work along EDSA Cubao will interrupt water service for Quezon City zones 1-4 on May 17-18. Affected households advised to store water. Water trucks at Araneta Coliseum parking lot.

Flash flood damage to water mains in Marikina City. Brgy. Sto. Nino, Brgy. Concepcion, Brgy. Tumana affected. Estimated repair: 72 hours. MWSS deploying emergency water tankers to affected communities.

BOIL WATER ADVISORY: Heavy rainfall caused turbidity in Laguna Lake affecting water treatment in Taguig and Muntinlupa. Water from taps may appear cloudy. Boil all water before consumption until further notice.

Maynilad emergency repair sa main pipe sa Valenzuela City. Affected: Parada, Dalandanan, Malinta, Gen. T. De Leon barangays. Walang tubig mula 8PM hanggang 6AM. Mag-imbak ng tubig. Tanker trucks sa barangay halls.
WATER INTERRUPTION: Manila Water emergency pipeline replacement in San Juan City affects Brgy. Addition Hills, Brgy. Batis, Brgy. Corazon de Jesus. Restoration expected 10PM. Store water in advance.

Critical water shortage in evacuation centers in Cagayan Valley after Typhoon Pepito. DSWD and LWUA coordinating emergency water supply. 15,000 evacuees without safe drinking water. Tanker trucks en route.

ADVISORY: Leakage detected in transmission main along C-5 Road affecting water pressure in Pasig, Taguig, and Pateros. Manila Water deploying repair crew. Reduced water pressure for 24 hours while repairs ongoing.

Water supply cut sa Paranaque, Las Pinas, Muntinlupa dahil sa emergency maintenance ng Putatan Treatment Plant. Maynilad nagpapadala ng water trucks sa mga barangay. Asahan ang service restoration bukas ng umaga.
ROAD CLOSURE ALERT: Marcos Highway in Marikina impassable due to landslide debris. All vehicles diverted to Sumulong Highway. DPWH crews mobilized for clearing. Estimated clearance: 6-8 hours.
TRAFFIC ADVISORY: MacArthur Bridge connecting Manila and Makati closed due to structural damage from flooding. Heavy vehicles rerouted via Nagtahan Bridge. DPWH assessment team on site.

Relief convoy from Quezon City to Cagayan de Oro delayed due to blocked highway in Nueva Vizcaya. Typhoon Pepito downed trees covering 3km stretch of Maharlika Highway. DPWH clearing operations underway.
LOGISTICS UPDATE: Calamity goods warehouse in Pasig City damaged by fire. 2,000 sacks of rice and emergency supplies lost. DSWD activating contingency stocks from Laguna and Batangas depots.

ROAD ALERT: Kennon Road and Marcos Highway both blocked due to landslides from heavy rainfall. Baguio City accessible only via Naguilian Road. Long queues expected. DPWH deploying heavy equipment for clearing.
Flood closed NLEX northbound in Bulacan from km 37 to km 43. Vehicles rerouted via SCTEX. Stranded motorists being assisted by NLEX crew. DPWH monitoring flood levels.

TYPHOON LOGISTICS BRIEF: Port of Manila suspended all cargo and passenger operations due to Typhoon Signal No. 3. Stranded vessels sheltering in Manila Bay. MARINA coordinating with PCG for vessel monitoring.

Relief operations in Catanduanes hampered by runway damage at Virac Airport after typhoon. Military C-130 unable to land. Sea transport only option. PCG coordinating vessels for relief goods delivery.

ADVISORY: Quirino Highway in Rizal impassable due to rockfall from Sierra Madre slopes. No estimated clearing time due to continuous rain. Alternative via Marikina-Infanta Road recommended for relief convoys.

Landslide blocks access road to 3 barangays in Benguet. Around 500 residents isolated. DSWD pre-positioned relief goods but delivery impossible. Helicopter extraction being considered for medical cases.
Tulay sa Ilocos Norte bumagsak dahil sa malakas na baha. Mga residente ng dalawang barangay walang access sa bayan. DPWH nagtatayo ng bailey bridge. Asahang matatapus sa loob ng 3 araw.

LOGISTICS ALERT: Fuel depot in Leyte flooded after Typhoon Uring. Gasoline supply critically low across Eastern Visayas. DOE coordinating emergency fuel delivery via sea. Generators at hospitals and evacuation centers prioritized.
ROAD CONDITION UPDATE: Cagayan Valley Road in Isabela has 15 sections with floodwater depth 0.5m to 1.2m. Heavy vehicles advised to avoid route. DPWH deploying water pumps and warning signs.
Typhoon damaged 3 warehouses at NFA complex in Leyte. Emergency procurement of replacement relief goods underway. NFA and DSWD coordinating resupply from Cebu and Mindanao depots.

Emergency road clearing on Nagcarlan-Liliw Road in Laguna after rockslide blocked both lanes. Relief vehicles carrying goods to flooded barangays forced to wait. DPWH crew working 24 hours to restore access.
